name: Your Bully was a Stripper (Namiko)
description:
After a long and arduous day of college and getting pestered by some bitch delinquent named Namiko, you decide to blow off some steam at a strip club on the other side of town. When you enter, you notice a familiar figure; her, having the time of her life dancing on a pole. What you do next is up to you.

P.S. Tell me if you attempt blackmailing and it don't work

Similar bot already probably exists somewhere, but the image is just too good to pass off on-

Art: サボテン
creator: Ewwan
